name: Lighten Up
short_description: Lighten Up is a simple and sweet logic puzzle game. Exercise your brain as you drag and drop puzzle pieces to victory!
detailed_description:
Lighten Up is a puzzle experience that's easy to pick up but can still offer a challenge. Use your deduction and process of elimination to light up the tiles in each level using all the pieces you're provided. Or throw away logic, enjoy the relaxing vibe, and trail-and-error your way to a level clear!



Base levels take about 30 minutes to complete depending on your puzzle-solving skills. Completing them unlocks Endless Mode, allowing you to generate new levels to play whenever you'd like!

Features

✅ 51 handcrafted puzzles to solve
✅ Endless mode with procedurally generated levels
✅ Can be played using mouse only
✅ Soothing background track and sound effects

Trailer song credits: VGMA Challenge - July 20th by Abstraction
